title: [MTR4] British Rail Class 180 Adelante pack
description: a resourcepack that adds the BR Class 180 Adelante series to Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview

![barbie class 180](https://i.imgur.com/f0D77A4.png)

The British Rail Class 180 “Adelante” is a diesel multiple unit train built between 2000 and 2001 by Alstom in Washwood Heath, United Kingdom.
Designed for high-speed intercity and long-distance regional services, the Class 180 was developed to deliver strong performance and improved passenger comfort on non-electrified main lines.

With a maximum speed of 125 mph (200 km/h), the Class 180 is one of the fastest diesel multiple units ever to operate on the UK rail network.

This resource pack adds the British Rail Class 180 to Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway 4 (MTR4) mod.
The original model was created by Plane Simple for Transport Fever 2 and was ported to MTR by me in 2025, with adjustments and optimizations specifically for MTR4.

## Included Liveries

This resource pack currently includes the following operator liveries:

- Grand Central

- Hull Trains

- First Great Western

Each livery is provided with a complete 6-car train formation, allowing realistic and consistent operation in MTR4.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, endorsed by, or an official product of British Rail, Alstom, Plane Simple, Transport Fever 2, or the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
All trademarks and brand names belong to their respective owners.
